name: Crossfor Co.,Ltd.
summary: Crossfor Co.,Ltd. manufactures, imports, and sells jewelry and diamonds, and accessories in Japan and internationally. It operates shops under the Dancing Stone and Crossfor Cut brand names. The company was formerly known as Shibado K.K. and changed its name to Crossfor Co.,Ltd. in November 2002. Crossfor Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Kofu, Japan.
